string.text: {=suiFqTxB}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}lady{?}lord{\?}, and I am honored to serve you.
{=s1FVPS5D}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Our family has served the French for generations.
{=cMO9JXvk}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}. We hold our lands in fief to {FIRST_NAME}, and we honor our oaths of fealty.
{=X76WW46v}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Our family has stood in the House of Lords and discharged its duties honorably since the first days of the French Kingdom.

{=kWot38iu}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Though one should not be too proud of one's lineage, I am glad to say that we have always taken seriously our duty to protect the common folk of the French.
{=FFXqPFwl}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}, one of the most illustrious families in the annals of Europe.

{=FFXqPFwl}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, one of the most illustrious families in the annals of the French. The Saracens we have slain, and the glory we have won, is second to none.
{=pn79h0aj}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}. Our line has served France in many a battle, and the English know that all too well.
